QCut.title: QCut
QCut.subtitle: Quantum Circuit Knitting
QCut.description: **QCut** is a **quantum circuit knitting** package built on top of **qiskit** for performing **gate cuts** and resetless **wire cuts** allowing simulation of larger **quantum circuits** on smaller quantum devices or simulators at the cost of a **circuit overhead**.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
Portfolio.subtitle: This website
Portfolio.description: **This website** is built using **Astro** and **SolidJS**. It features a custom design, smooth animations, and a responsive layout. The source code is available on GitHub.

PortfolioBackend.title: Portfolio Backend
PortfolioBackend.subtitle: Backend for the portfolio website
PortfolioBackend.description: **Portfolio Backend** is a simple backend server built with **Rust** and the **Salvo** web framework. It provides an API for managing the notes for the portfolio website and some admin functionality using JWT authentication.

QCutFind.title: QCutFind
QCutFind.subtitle: Quantum Circuit Partitioner
QCutFind.description: **QCutFind** is a tool for finding optimal setas of wire and gate cuts in quantum circuits. It uses a graph-based approach to identify the best places to cut a quantum circuit in order to minimize the overhead of circuit knitting. QCutFind is built in to **QCut** and uses **Metis** for graph partitioning.

FiQCI website.title: FiQCI website
FiQCI website.subtitle: Finnish Quantum Computing Infrastructure
FiQCI website.description: The official website for the **Finnish Quantum Computing Infrastructure (FiQCI)**. The website provides information about the project, its goals, its members, and details and status of available **Quantum Computers**. It also features a blog where updates and news about the project are posted.

Mood Pixels.title: Mood Pixels
Mood Pixels.subtitle: A mood tracking app
Mood Pixels.description: **Mood Pixels** is a **mood tracking app** built with **Flutter**. It allows users to track their daily moods and view statistics. The app features a simple and intuitive interface, customizable mood categories, and data visualization tools.
